features.title: Script hardening
features.description: JSDoc annotations on all exports across 5 lib modules and entry point. Runtime schema validation in readState() and readFeatures(). Circular dependency detection in selectNextFeature(). Standardize error handling to throw UserError instead of returning {ok: false}. Fix git message escaping in autoCommit() for all shell metacharacters.
steps: Verify JSDoc @param and @returns annotations on all exported functions in state.mjs, features.mjs, git.mjs, artifacts.mjs, progress.mjs, and harness-companion.mjs
Call readState() with a state.json missing required fields and verify it throws UserError with descriptive message
Call readFeatures() with malformed features.json and verify it throws UserError with descriptive message
Create a features.json with circular depends_on (e.g., A->B->A) and verify selectNextFeature() throws UserError naming the cycle
Verify autoCommit() throws UserError on git failure instead of returning {ok: false}
Verify updateTimestamp() throws UserError when progress.md does not exist instead of returning {ok: false}
Test autoCommit() with a message containing backticks, dollar signs, and single quotes and verify it commits without shell interpretation

features.title: Feature-update subcommand
features.description: CLI-driven feature.passes/status/maturity mutation via feature-update subcommand. Supports --id, --set-passes, --set-status, --set-maturity flags. Validates feature ID exists. Uses atomic write. Outputs updated feature as JSON to stdout.
steps: Run feature-update --id F-XXX --set-passes true and verify features.json is updated atomically
Run feature-update --id F-XXX --set-status in_progress and verify the status field changes
Run feature-update --id F-XXX --set-maturity functional and verify the maturity field changes
Run feature-update with multiple --set-* flags combined and verify all fields update in one call
Run feature-update with a nonexistent feature ID and verify UserError is thrown
Verify stdout contains the updated feature object as valid JSON
features.notes: Sprint 1 target, paired with F-015. Depends on standardized error handling from F-015.

features.title: Per-step metrics recording
features.description: Extend cost_tracking phases with optional file_changes and evaluation_scores fields. Add collectFileChanges() helper in git.mjs. Add metrics-summary subcommand that aggregates duration, file changes, and score trends across rounds.
steps: Run collectFileChanges() and verify it parses git diff --shortstat output into {insertions, deletions, files_changed}
Verify cost_tracking phases can include file_changes and evaluation_scores without breaking existing state.json reads
Run metrics-summary subcommand and verify JSON output contains per-phase duration totals
Verify metrics-summary output contains file change aggregates (total insertions, deletions)
Verify metrics-summary output contains score trend arrays per criterion

features.title: Structured event logging
features.description: New lib/events.mjs module managing .harness/events.jsonl. Exports logEvent() that appends timestamped JSON lines. Supports event types: agent_spawned, phase_changed, feature_selected, evaluation_completed, commit_made, error_logged. Add log-event subcommand to harness-companion.mjs.
steps: Run log-event --type phase_changed --round 1 and verify a valid JSONL line is appended to .harness/events.jsonl
Verify the JSONL line contains timestamp (ISO 8601), event_type, round, feature_id, and data fields
Run log-event with --feature flag and verify feature_id is recorded
Run log-event with --data flag containing JSON and verify it is parsed into the data field
Run log-event without --round and --feature and verify they default to null
Verify events.jsonl is created if it does not exist on first call

features.title: Postmortem command
features.description: New /harness:postmortem command with command file and role file. Reads evaluation JSONs, state.json, features.json, and events.jsonl. Generates .harness/postmortem.md with 5 sections: Timeline, Score Trends, Failure Analysis, Process Compliance, Recommendations.
steps: Verify plugins/harness/commands/postmortem.md exists with correct command structure
Verify plugins/harness/skills/harness/roles/postmortem.md exists with full agent instructions
Verify plugin.json manifest includes the postmortem command registration
Run /harness:postmortem and verify .harness/postmortem.md is generated
Verify postmortem.md contains all 5 sections: Timeline, Score Trends, Failure Analysis, Process Compliance, Recommendations
features.notes: Sprint 3 target, standalone. Depends on metrics (F-017) and events (F-018) being available.

features.title: Hook integration for auto-logging
features.description: Update hooks.json to call log-event at relevant trigger points. Update coordinator.md and generator.md to instruct agents to call log-event on agent spawns, phase changes, feature selection, evaluation completion, and commits.
steps: Verify hooks.json includes log-event triggers for agent_spawned and commit_made events
Verify coordinator.md includes instructions to call log-event on phase_changed and evaluation_completed
Verify generator.md or session.md includes instructions to call log-event on feature_selected and agent_spawned
Simulate a normal harness operation flow and verify events are logged automatically without manual log-event calls
features.notes: Sprint 4 target, standalone. Depends on F-018 log-event existing and F-019 postmortem command being registered.
